response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most roles centered on JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web technologies; while they have a brief C++ mention from 2014–2015 at National Instruments, there is no evidence of recent or deep expertise in STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or cloud-based industrial platforms required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across diverse tech stacks and domains
Demonstrated leadership in open-source and community technical education
Proven ability to deliver complex systems under tight constraints
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development in the last 9 years
Lacks exposure to industrial IoT protocols, SDL, or IEC 62443 standards
Experience is heavily weighted toward web/mobile, not on-premises/cloud industrial platforms
